SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 28, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO COLIN SHERMAN NELSON RETURN TO SENDER -ATTEMPED NOT KNOWN- UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NELSON, COLIN SHERMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF COLIN SHERMAN NELSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
